title: Brotein restaurants seed — 25 fast-food chains with bro-coded copy
html:
Supabase table view of Brotein's restaurants seed — 25 fast-food chains (Subway → In-N-Out, including Chipotle, Voodoo Doughnut, Panda, Cane's, Wingstop, Five Guys, KFC, Wendy's…) each tagged with a one-line bro-coded description ("Subs, salads, and protein-packed sandwiches for bros on the go", "Doughnuts aren't anabolic, but here's how to fit them in your macros"). The voice + scope is the clearest single artifact of Brotein's actual product surface.

TL;DR

  • 25 named chains seeded — Subway, Starbucks, McDonald's, Taco Bell, Dairy Queen, Domino's, Burger King, Pizza Hut, Carl's Jr, Jack in the Box, KFC, Panda Express, Little Caesars, Chipotle, Wendy's, Five Guys, MOD Pizza, Panera, Chick-fil-A, Wingstop, Jersey Mike's, Voodoo Doughnut, Jimmy John's, Raising Cane's, In-N-Out.
  • Each row carries a written bro-tone descriptor — Yahir's voice, not auto-generated; e.g. "Wings and tenders for protein lovers — best picks for muscle".
  • Voodoo Doughnut inclusion (an Oregon-only chain) anchors Brotein's catalog to Yahir's Corvallis/Portland starting market.
  • Sibling capture to the May 2/6/13 Brotein schema views — this is the content layer for the protein-bar/menu schema.
  • Confirms Brotein ≠ pure bar-tracker — it's a menu-scanner across chain restaurants in the BroMenu / restaurant menu scraping lineage.

brotein · supabase · bromenu · restaurant menu scraping · anabolic scoring · chipotle · voodoo doughnut
